actions.title: JonesinSRC website track
actions.description: Canonical registry entry for the JonesinSRC website so storefront trust, lead capture, funnel truth, and conversion work attach to one stable surface instead of scattering across theme edits and chat notes.
acceptance_criteria: Registry record preserves the website identity, directory, and temporary domain context
Future funnel, contact, and checkout actions can reference the website slug
Current trust-signal and lead-capture improvements are preserved in evidence

evidence.value: Trust signals and a lead-capture form were added to the site, but WallSlayer is still live with zero sales so the website remains a primary conversion surface.

actions.title: WallSlayer product track
actions.description: Canonical registry entry for WallSlayer so storefront, pricing, support, and zero-sales diagnostics can attach to one stable product record.
acceptance_criteria: Registry record preserves product identity, price path, and delivery model
Future storefront and funnel actions can reference the product slug
Current live-zero-sales context is preserved in evidence

actions.title: PrizePicks Monster product track
actions.description: Canonical registry entry for PrizePicks Monster DFS player prop intelligence app. Rebuilt from Kalshi Monster base after WSL data loss.
acceptance_criteria: Registry record preserves product identity, price, and delivery model
Future storefront and funnel actions can reference the product slug
Rebuild from Kalshi Monster codebase is tracked

evidence.value: Rebuilt from Kalshi Monster base. Tauri 2 + Rust + React. Player prop fetcher, chat context, and UI rebranded. Cron workdir updated.

actions.result_summary: Rebuilt from Kalshi Monster base. New repo at C:/Projects/prizepicks-monster. 107 Tauri commands, 4 new prop commands. Frontend rebranded. Cron workdir updated.

actions.title: Home-base / Jarvis core track
actions.description: Canonical registry entry for the home-base project — the central AI infrastructure platform. Tracks agent implementations, action registry, and cross-project orchestration.

Action registry tracks agent implementations across all projects

Daily cron integrity pass is registered

actions.title: PrizePicks Monster rebuild from Kalshi Monster base
actions.description: Rebuild PrizePicks Monster as a new project using Kalshi Monster codebase as the foundation. WSL data loss destroyed the original repo. New repo at C:/Projects/prizepicks-monster.
acceptance_criteria: New repo created at C:/Projects/prizepicks-monster
All Kalshi-specific code removed or rebranded to PrizePicks
Player prop fetcher implemented (mock data acceptable for v1)
Chat context builder rewritten for DFS player props
Frontend UI rebranded (PrizePicks Monster, prop board, etc.)
Tauri commands registered for prop data (get_props, search_props, get_scored_props)
Cron job workdir updated to new repo path
System prompt rewritten for DFS player prop analysis
actions.result_summary: PrizePicks Monster rebuilt from Kalshi Monster base. 107 Tauri commands registered (4 new prop commands). Frontend rebranded. Cron workdir updated. Prop fetcher returns mock data — real OpticOdds/Apify integration pending.

actions.title: Fix cron job workdirs for WSL-migrated projects
actions.description: Jarvis, PrizePicks Monster, and Kalshi Monster cron jobs had stale WSL UNC workdirs. Projects were moved to native Windows paths. Updated all three cron workdirs.
acceptance_criteria: Jarvis cron workdir points to C:/Projects/home-base-recovered
PrizePicks Monster cron workdir points to C:/Projects/prizepicks-monster
Kalshi Monster cron workdir points to C:/Users/ethan/kalshi-build/kalshi-monster
actions.result_summary: All three cron workdirs updated from WSL UNC paths to native Windows paths. JonesinSRC, WallSlayer, and Snitch LLC crons were already on native paths.
